cap = cv2.VideoCapture(0, cv2.CAP_DSHOW)
while True:
    ret, frame = cap.read()
    if not ret: break
    gray = cv2.cvtColor(frame, cv2.COLOR_BGR2GRAY)
    faces = face_classifier.detectMultiScale(gray, 1.3, 5)
    for (x, y, w, h) in faces:
        face_roi = cv2.resize(gray[y:y+h, x:x+w], (200, 200))
